name: graphgraph
description: Codex integration for GraphGraph codebase context retrieval, packet validation, and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Use compact graph packets for codebase context in Codex.
interface.longDescription: GraphGraph bundles a Codex skill and MCP server configuration for scanning repositories, finding graph anchors, rendering final context packets, and validating compressed codebase graph evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use GraphGraph to explain this subsystem.
